positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cozy forest cottage nestled among oversized bioluminescent mushrooms and gentle vines. The scene features a prominent, glowing fox curled up in the window of the cottage, looking out at a gentle snowfall. The overall style is highly detailed storybook illustration meets vaporwave aesthetic, utilizing deep indigo, emerald green, and warm glowing peach accents. The composition should be centered and highly detailed, with clean, defined silhouettes and strong contrast between the soft background glow and the sharp foreground elements. Perfect for textile printing. --ar 1:1
negative: low resolution, worst quality, out of focus, blur, noise, artifact, signature, watermark, text, dirty, cropped, bad anatomy, multiple limbs, extra fingers, muted colors
